minimumDPI.description: The minimum DPI that cards must meet to be included in search results

maximumDPI.description: The maximum DPI that cards can have to be included in search results

maximumSize.description: The maximum filesize that cards can have to be included in search results

languages.description: The language the cards have to be written in to be included in search results

includesTags.description: The tags which the cards must have to be included in search results

excludesTags.description: The tags which the cards must *not* have to be included in search results

fullArtOnly.description: Opt-in filter. When true, excludes cards whose community-resolved printing (printingTagStatus == RESOLVED) is confirmed not full-art. Cards without a resolved printing are never excluded by this filter - they're unknowns, not mismatches.

borderlessOnly.description: Opt-in filter. When true, excludes cards whose community-resolved printing (printingTagStatus == RESOLVED) is confirmed not borderless. Cards without a resolved printing are never excluded by this filter - they're unknowns, not mismatches.
